question: [File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/services/account_service.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: AccountBalance()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the metadata map allocation (line 66: make(map[string]any)) by sending requests that always trigger both the HasAlias and isEd25519PublicKey branches, causing repeated heap allocations that increase GC pressure and degrade the gossip transaction processing throughput?
